product.name: AORUS MASTER 16 AM6H
product.source_note: Official GIGABYTE Taiwan product specification page. Specs may vary by country and region.

common_specs.作業系統:
Windows 11 Pro (GIGABYTE recommends Windows 11 Pro for business.)
Windows 11 Home
UEFI Shell OS
common_specs.中央處理器: Intel Core Ultra 9 Processor 275HX (36MB cache, up to 5.4 GHz, 24 cores, 24 threads)
common_specs.顯示器: 16 inch 16:10 OLED WQXGA (2560x1600) 240Hz, 1ms, DCI-P3 100%, 500 nits peak, 1,000,000:1 contrast. Supports NVIDIA G-SYNC, NVIDIA Advanced Optimus, VESA DisplayHDR True Black 500, VESA ClearMR 10000, Pantone Validated, TUV Rheinland Low Blue Light, and Dolby Vision.
common_specs.記憶體: Up to 64GB DDR5 5600MHz. 2x SO-DIMM sockets for expansion.
common_specs.儲存裝置: 1x PCIe Gen5 M.2 slot, 1x PCIe Gen4x4 M.2 slot, up to 4TB PCIe NVMe M.2 SSD. Storage capacity may differ by country and region.
common_specs.鍵盤種類: 3-zone RGB Backlit Keyboard, up to 1.7mm key-travel, supports N-Key.
common_specs.連接埠:
Left side: 1 x DC in, 1 x RJ-45, 1 x HDMI 2.1, 1 x Type-A support USB3.2 Gen2, 1 x Type-C with Thunderbolt 5 supporting USB4, DisplayPort 2.1 and Power Delivery 3.0.
Right side: 1 x Type-A support USB3.2 Gen2, 1 x Type-C with Thunderbolt 4 supporting USB4, DisplayPort 1.4 and Power Delivery 3.0, 1 x MicroSD (UHS-II), 1 x Audio Jack support mic/headphone combo.
common_specs.音效: 4x 2W speakers, microphone, Dolby Atmos, Smart Amp Technology.
common_specs.視訊鏡頭: FHD (1080p) IR Webcam, built-in array microphone, supports Windows Hello Face Authentication.
common_specs.安全裝置: Firmware-based TPM, supports Intel Platform Trust Technology (Intel PTT).
common_specs.尺寸: 357 x 254 x 23~29.9 mm. Dimensions may vary according to configuration, manufacturing process and measurement method.
common_specs.重量: Approximately 2.5 kg. Weight may vary according to configuration, manufacturing process and measurement method.

variant_specs.顯示晶片: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090 Laptop GPU, 24GB GDDR7, 175W Maximum Graphics Power with Dynamic Boost. AI Boost: 1797 MHz (1597 MHz Boost Clock + 200 MHz OC). May vary by scenario.
NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5080 Laptop GPU, 16GB GDDR7, 175W Maximum Graphics Power with Dynamic Boost. AI Boost: 1902 MHz (1702 MHz Boost Clock + 200 MHz OC). May vary by scenario.
NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5070 Ti Laptop GPU, 12GB GDDR7, 140W Maximum Graphics Power with Dynamic Boost. AI Boost: 1962 MHz (1762 MHz Boost Clock + 200 MHz OC). May vary by scenario.
